title: Great Void Gate
content:
The 
Great Void Gate
 is the doorway to the Third Step.

Overview
[
]

The gate appears before a 
Nirvana Shatterer
 or 
Heaven's Blight
 Cultivator who has successfully cultivated an 
Essence
 to completion.

In the event that all Five Heaven Blights havent been endured, the gate will be firmly shut and the practitionar will have to forcibly break it open. The act of doing so however is beyond difficult and will certainly require more than just that one Essense worth of power. The sole example is Wang Lin, who broke open the gate without ever enduring a single Heaven's Blight. 
Situ Nan
 was also able to do something similar with help from 
Celestial Emperor Qing Lin
.

When the gate is opened, Void Energy is bestowed upon the Cultivator, allowing them to enter the 
Nirvana Void
 level. However if the practitioner so chooses they can refuse to absorb that energy right away, this results in further gates appearing, each stronger than the last. Wang Lin for example  refused to absorb the Void energy released to become a Third Step Cultivator through only one Essense, and he instead shattered five Void Gates, one for each Essense.

Should the practitioner persist in this then eventually the Ten Thousand Bone Great Void Gate will appear as it did for Wang Lin's sixth and final Slaughter Essense, this is a special kind of Void Gate that appears only before people of exceptional talent.

With every subsequent gate he broke Wang Lin skipped a stage in Nirvana Void, eventually allowing him to reach the middle level of 
Spirit Void
.
